blade.description: Determines the melee weapon form of the gunblade. While equipped, you gain the listed feat for this weapon only.

basic.name: Spear Assembly
basic.passive: You gain the Polearm Master feat for this weapon.

basic.name: Glaive Assembly
basic.passive: You gain the Sentinel feat for this weapon.

basic.name: Saber Chassis
basic.passive: You gain the Mobile feat while wielding this weapon.

basic.name: Greatblade Frame
basic.passive: You gain the Great Weapon Master feat for this weapon.

basic.name: Warhammer Mount
basic.passive: You gain the Crusher feat for this weapon.

basic.name: Hooked Pike
basic.passive: You gain the Slasher feat for this weapon.

basic.name: Frost Edge
basic.passive: Once per turn when you hit a creature, its speed is reduced by 10 feet until the end of its next turn.

active.effect: The next creature you hit this turn has its speed reduced to 0 until the end of its next turn.

basic.name: Shock Edge
basic.passive: Once per turn, deal +1 lightning damage on a melee hit.

active.effect: The next creature you hit cannot take reactions until the start of its next turn.

basic.name: Serrated Edge
basic.passive: Once per turn when you hit a wounded creature, deal +1d4 slashing damage.

active.effect: The target takes 1d6 slashing damage at the start of its next turn.

basic.name: Phase Edge
basic.passive: You may choose for your melee attacks to deal force damage.

active.effect: The next melee hit ignores resistance to its damage type.

basic.name: Radiant Edge
basic.passive: Your melee attacks deal radiant damage.

active.effect: The next creature you hit has disadvantage on its next saving throw.

basic.name: Grasping Edge
basic.passive: Once per turn when you hit, you may pull the target 5 feet toward you.

active.effect: Pull the target 10 feet and knock it prone (Strength save negates).

core.description: Determines firearm damage dice and damage type.

basic.name: Stabilized Core
basic.passive: Firearm attacks deal 1d10 force damage.

active.effect: The next firearm hit deals +1d8 force damage.

basic.name: Kinetic Core
basic.passive: Firearm attacks deal 1d8 bludgeoning damage.

active.effect: On hit, push the target 10 feet and knock it prone (Strength save negates).

basic.name: Thermal Core
basic.passive: Firearm attacks deal 1d8 fire damage.

active.effect: The target takes 1d8 fire damage at the start of its next turn.

basic.name: Resonant Core
basic.passive: Firearm attacks deal 1d8 thunder damage.

active.effect: Each creature within 5 feet of the target takes 1d6 thunder damage.

basic.name: Precision Core
basic.passive: Firearm attacks deal 1d8 force damage and gain +1 to hit.

active.effect: You gain advantage on your next firearm attack this turn.

basic.name: Unstable Core
basic.passive: Firearm attacks deal 1d12 force damage.

active.effect: Deal +1d10 force damage and take force damage equal to your proficiency bonus.

basic.name: Focused Channel
basic.passive: Firearm attacks target only one creature.

active.effect: The next firearm attack ignores disadvantage.

basic.name: Piercing Channel
basic.passive: On hit, you may make a second attack roll against another creature in a line.

active.effect: If the first attack hits, the second attack automatically hits.

basic.name: Scatter Channel
basic.passive: Firearm attacks affect a 10-foot cone (Dex save half).

active.effect: Creatures failing the save are pushed 5 feet.

basic.name: Arcing Channel
basic.passive: On hit, another creature within 10 feet takes INT modifier damage.

active.effect: The secondary creature instead takes full firearm damage.

basic.name: Breach Channel
basic.passive: Firearm attacks ignore half cover.

active.effect: The next firearm attack ignores all cover.

basic.name: Suppression Channel
basic.passive: Creatures hit have their speed reduced by 10 feet.

active.effect: The target has disadvantage on its next attack roll.

frame.description: Affects positioning, durability, and action economy.

basic.name: Skirmisher Frame
basic.passive: Your speed increases by 10 feet.

active.effect: You take the Disengage action.

basic.name: Bulwark Frame
basic.passive: You gain +1 AC.

active.effect: Reduce incoming damage by PB + INT modifier.

basic.name: Anchor Frame
basic.passive: You have advantage on saves against being pushed or knocked prone.

active.effect: You cannot be moved against your will until your next turn.

basic.name: Reflex Frame
basic.passive: Add your Intelligence modifier (minimum +1) to initiative rolls.

active.effect: You take the Dodge action.

basic.name: Assault Frame
basic.passive: Once per turn if you moved 10 feet, deal +1 damage.

active.effect: You have advantage on opportunity attacks this turn.

basic.name: Field Repair Frame
basic.passive: Once per short rest when you reduce a creature to 0 HP, regain 1 charge.

active.effect: End one negative condition affecting you.
